title: dactylorhiza × conigera
intro: Dactylorhiza × conigera, a hybrid orchid species, is a result of the cross-pollination between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Coeloglossum viride. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × conigera include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or capsules, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
